name: Tostada Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the refried beans with the taco seasoning mix.
2. Spread the mixture on a large plate or pie plate.
3. Layer the remaining ingredients over the refried bean mixture: chopped green chilies, black olives, onion, shredded Cheddar cheese, mashed avocado, and canned tomatoes.
4. Serve with taco chips.
5. This dip can be served cold or heated through to melt the cheese. Enjoy it while fresh, as there may not be any leftovers.
